fields.title: Social Media Growth Strategy for Beginners
fields.metaTitle: Social Media Growth Strategy for Beginners | Learn | InstantViral
fields.metaDescription: Start with one primary platform, a simple content cadence, and metrics that match your goal. Depth beats scattered posting across every network.
faqs: How many platforms should beginners use?
How soon should I expect results?

fields.newsletterCopy: Start with one primary platform, a simple content cadence, and metrics that match your goal. Depth beats scattered posting across every network.
